notes: Parallel sunlight lines terminate at Earth's illuminated limb and never render through the opaque globe.
The anti-solar hemisphere is a clean dark shadow region with a precise terminator; no dotted-sphere texture is used.
The fixed surface marker, c value, and day/night label agree at 0°, 60°, 90°, 180°, and 360°.
Solar corona, layered star field, atmospheric rim, shadow cone, idle drift, and location-state chip pass the v1.1 review.
